raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint against Citibank regarding a merchant dispute ( Case ID : XXXX ) that was unfairly denied on XX/XX/XXXX. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, I ordered a pair of sunglasses from XXXX XXXX Per the merchant 's return policy, I returned the items, and they were officially delivered back to XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. I have provided proof of delivery to both the merchant and Citibank. 
I opened a claim with XXXX ( Reference No : XXXX ) to request my refund. XXXX acknowledged receipt but stated it would take XXXX weeks to process the credit. Fearing the expiration of my dispute rights under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ), I proactively opened a dispute with Citibank on XX/XX/XXXX. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, Citibank denied my claim, stating they " no longer have any recourse to obtain credit '' because the timeframe for resolving the dispute had passed. This is a violation of my consumer rights under the FCBA for the following reasons : Timely Notification : I notified Citibank of the billing error ( a missing credit for a return ) on XX/XX/XXXX, which is well within the XXXX window of the original charge and within a month of the return being delivered. 
Merchant Cooperation : The merchant has acknowledged the return but is withholding funds beyond a reasonable timeframe ( XXXX weeks ). 
Failure to Investigate : Citibank 's claim that the timeframe " has passed '' is inaccurate, as the dispute was initiated promptly. Under the FCBA, the creditor must resolve the dispute within XXXX billing cycles or XXXX days. 
Desired Resolution : I am seeking a full refund of the disputed amount, as the merchant is in possession of the returned goods and has failed to issue the promised credit. I also request that any interest or fees associated with this disputed amount be reversed.
